examples.output: We will meet fortnightly, on Tuesdays at 18:00 UTC, starting from the first Tuesday in July.

aiGuidance.extraction: Look for the moment agreement is reached — signalled by so we are agreed, let us go with, or a direct statement of resolution. Extract the commitment itself, not the discussion around it. One sentence.
aiGuidance.purpose: States the settled commitment in one concise, active-voice sentence. This is the record of what was decided, not why.

description: The settled commitment in one active-voice sentence.
name: decision_statement
